title: Validating User Input for a Travel Booking Form
scenario: A travel company wants to validate user input for a booking form. The form includes fields for name, email, phone number, and destination. The user wants to extract a JSON object with the validated input. The target artifact should include error messages for any invalid input.
constraints: Must validate name using regular expression
Must validate email using regular expression
Must validate phone number using regular expression

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output validates the input correctly (name, email, phone number)
Check if the output includes error messages for invalid input
Check if the output length is within the specified limit (200 characters)
